visuals.title: Convolution Process Step-by-Step
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">The Convolution Operation</text>
  
  <!-- Input Matrix -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="120" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input Matrix
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Kernel -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="60" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Kernel
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Output Feature Map -->
  <rect x="170" y="220" width="90" height="90" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Output
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows -->
  <path d="M170 120 L200 120 L200 220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M250 120 L220 120 L220 220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Convolution Operation Label -->
  <text x="215" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Convolution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Matrix Elements -->
  <rect x="60" y="70" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="85" y="70" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="70" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="135" y="70" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <rect x="60" y="95" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="85" y="95" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="95" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="135" y="95" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <rect x="60" y="120" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="85" y="120" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="120" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="135" y="120" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <rect x="60" y="145" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="85" y="145" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="145" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="135" y="145" width="20" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
